entry.title: Prime for Young Adults introduces 5% cash back on dorm and apartment essentials, just in time for move-in
entry.summary: From today through September 15, Prime for Young Adults members can earn 5% cash back on home, kitchen, and office purchases—on top of existing categories like beauty, apparel, and electronics.

entry.title: How to watch the 'Masters of the Universe' movie, streaming on Prime Video starting July 22
entry.summary: The live-action film adaptation of the classic 1980s toy brand stars Nicholas Galitzine as Prince Adam/He-Man.

entry.title: What you need to know about Amazon today: July 20, 2026
entry.summary: Here are the latest headlines from Amazon News.

entry.title: Amazon’s commitment to low prices every day
entry.summary: Amazon offers the lowest prices every day across the widest selection of products—plus extra savings for Prime members.

entry.title: How to watch the NBA Summer League on Prime Video
entry.summary: Prime Video will stream the NBA SoFI Play-In Tournament, as well select games from the first two rounds.

entry.title: How to watch the WNBA on Prime Video
entry.summary: Prime Video will stream 30 WNBA regular-season games, featuring stars like Caitlin Clark, A'ja Wilson, and 2026 No. 1 pick Azzi Fudd.

entry.title: Entertainment
entry.summary: Stories about the latest apps and games, movies, TV shows, and music available from Amazon Prime Video, Amazon Music, and Kindle.

entry.title: Company news
entry.summary: News and information about Amazon, Inc.

entry.title: Retail
entry.summary: More information about shopping on Amazon and our selection of products and services.

entry.title: AWS
entry.summary: If you're an inventor, you'll love being an Amazonian. From day one at Amazon, you'll take ownership of projects that have a direct impact on our customers.
